case_title: STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. vs. HOFFMAN, CHRISTOPHER

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOFFMAN, CHRISTOPHER $2,561.68 PRINCIPAL, $98.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,659.68
